description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single stage named report. Define many jobs (e.g., accessibility-merge-requests-needing-attention, acquisition-merge-requests-needing-attention, activation-merge-requests-needing-attention, …, import-merge-requests-needing-attention, global_search-merge-requests-needing-attention) that each extend a hidden .run template, run in the report stage, set the variable TRIAGE_POLICY_FILE to the matching policies/generated/merge-requests-needing-attention.yml.erb/<name>.yml file, and are triggered only when $TRIAGE_MERGE_REQUESTS_NEEDING_ATTENTION is true and the corresponding $TRIAGE_MERGE_REQUESTS_NEEDING_ATTENTION_<NAME> variable is true. The shared .run template (not shown) contains the actual script that processes the policy file.
